title: How can I see all the tasks which I am not the owner, but delegated to other people?
excerpt: how can I see all the tasks which I am not the owner, but delegated to other people?

posts.author: Lukas (Lukas)
posts.cookedHtml: how can I see all the tasks which I am not the owner, but delegated to other people?

posts.author: Dani (Dani Lester)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Lukas

Welcome to the Community!

You can use the My Work feature to see all tasks assigned to yourself or other members of your team.

You can use the settings to customise who should be included in My Work, which allow you to see the tasks they are following too:

image798×1282 63.7 KB

I hope this helps! Remember to mark as solved if this answers your question

Best,

Dani
